use std::collections::HashMap;

fn process_user_data(users: &[User]) -> HashMap<u64, String> {
    let mut result = HashMap::new();
    for user in users {
        dbg!(&user.name);
        let display = format!("{} ({})", user.name, user.email);
        dbg!(&display);
        result.insert(user.id, display);
    }
    result
}

fn calculate_discount(price: f64, quantity: u32) -> f64 {
    let base = price * quantity as f64;
    dbg!(base);
    let discount = if quantity > 100 {
        base * 0.15
    } else if quantity > 50 {
        base * 0.10
    } else {
        0.0
    };
    dbg!(discount);
    base - discount
}

struct User {
    id: u64,
    name: String,
    email: String,
}
